ResourceConfigItem.title: ResourceConfigItem

ResourceSummaryItem.description:
Single resource in summary array.

resource_config is an array of config items with explicit units:
[
    {"key": "size", "value": 100, "unit": "GB"},
    {"key": "iops", "value": 3000, "unit": "IOPS"},
    {"key": "throughput", "value": 125, "unit": "MB/s"},
    {"key": "engine", "value": "mysql", "unit": null},
    {"key": "multi_az", "value": true, "unit": null},
    {"key": "num_nodes", "value": 3, "unit": "nodes"}
]
ResourceSummaryItem.title: ResourceSummaryItem

UpdateRoleRequest.description:
Request body for PATCH role. All fields are optional.

Only fields that are **present** in the request body are updated.
Omitted fields (key not sent at all) are left unchanged on the role.

description.description: Role description; omit to leave unchanged
description.title: Description

image_url.description: Image URL; omit to leave unchanged
image_url.title: Image Url

is_superrole.description: Whether this role is a superrole; omit to leave unchanged
is_superrole.title: Is Superrole

name.description: Role name (unique); omit to leave unchanged
name.title: Name

UpdateRoleRequest.title: UpdateRoleRequest

UpdateUserRequest.description:
Request body for PATCH user. All fields are optional.

Only fields that are **present** in the request body are updated.
Omitted fields are left unchanged. Plain `password` is hashed by the service before storage.

first_name.description: First name; omit to leave unchanged
first_name.title: First Name

hashed_password.description: Hashed password (internal; do not send from API); omit to leave unchanged
hashed_password.title: Hashed Password

is_owner.description: Whether user is owner; omit to leave unchanged
is_owner.title: Is Owner

is_superuser.description: Whether user is superuser; omit to leave unchanged
is_superuser.title: Is Superuser

last_name.description: Last name; omit to leave unchanged
last_name.title: Last Name

password.description: Plain password (hashed by service); omit to leave unchanged
password.title: Password

phone_number.description: Phone number; omit to leave unchanged
phone_number.title: Phone Number

status.description: User status (e.g. ACTIVE, PENDING_ACTIVATION); omit to leave unchanged

UpdateUserRequest.title: UpdateUserRequest

post.description:
Send owner invitation email for an existing root company.
Generates signup_token (1 day, single-use) and sends invitation.
Requires permission auth:send_owner_signup_invitation (e.g. superuser).

Send reset password invitation email for a user.
Generates signup_token (1 day, single-use) and sends invitation. User must exist and have a company.
Requires permission auth:send_reset_password_invitation.

Send signup invitation email for a company. Requires invitation_type.
Invitee email must use the company domain (domain_email is the domain only, e.g. jetscale.ai). Uses company-only template.
Requires permission auth:send_signup_invitation.

get.description: Current user and active session. Requires valid Bearer token.

post.description:
Reset password by email and new password. Updates the user's password.
Requires permission auth:reset_password.

Reset password using the token from the reset-password invitation email.
Validates invitation (exists, not expired, not used, type RESET_PASSWORD), updates the user's
password, then marks the invitation as used. Public; no auth required.

get.description:
List role assignments with pagination, sort, field filters.
Superuser and owner bypass permission checks.

post.description: Create a role assignment. Returns 409 if (user, business_unit) already assigned.

get.description:
Get a role assignment by UUID.
Superuser and owner bypass permission checks.

patch.description: Update a role assignment by UUID (partial). 404 if not found, 409 if (user, business_unit) conflict.

get.description:
List roles with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

**Query params (from request):**
- BaseApiFilterQueryParams: api_offset, api_limit, api_sort (e.g. ?api_offset=0&api_limit=10&api_sort=name).
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,name,description).
- Model filters (Role fields): id, name, description, is_superrole, etc. with BaseApiModelQueryOperation
  (e.g. ?name=eq admin, ?is_superrole=true).

post.description:
Create a new role.

**Body:** name (required), description, image_url, is_superrole, permissions (optional).
Returns 409 Conflict if a role with the same name already exists.

get.description:
Get a role by UUID.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,name,description).

patch.description:
Update a role by UUID (partial). Only provided body fields are updated.

**Body:** name, description, image_url, is_superrole, permissions (all optional).
Returns 404 if role not found, 409 Conflict if name is changed to an existing role name.

post.description:
Delete a role by UUID. Returns 409 if the role has any assignments linked to it.
Returns 404 if role not found.

Sign in with login (email or username) and password.
Returns user_session (if user has a company) and tokens. Validates user exists, is active,
has company/role when not superuser/owner, then closes open sessions and creates a new OPEN session.
Sign out by closing the current session. Requires valid Bearer token.

Invitation-based sign-up. Accepts signup_token and user profile (username, password,
optional first_name, last_name). Email is taken from the invitation (invitee_email).
Sets is_owner/is_superuser and company based on invitation type, then signs the user in.
Returns user_session and tokens (same as sign-in). Public; no auth required.

Exchange a valid refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.
Does not require authentication. Returns new Token (access_token, refresh_token, expires_in).
Errors are raised by the service (e.g. invalid/expired token).

get.description: List user activities with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

Get a user activity by UUID.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,action_type,occurred_at).
List user invitations with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

Get a user invitation by UUID.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,company,invitee_email).
List user sessions with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

Get a user session by UUID.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,user,started_at).
List users with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

Get a user by UUID.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_fields=id,email,username).

patch.description:
Update a user by UUID (partial). Only provided body fields are updated.

**Body:** username, password, first_name, last_name, is_owner, is_superuser, company (all optional).
Returns 404 if user not found.

post.description: Delete a user and all their role assignments. Returns 404 if user not found.

Set the user's status. Body: status (UserStatus).
If status is DEACTIVATED or TERMINATED, all open sessions for that user are closed first, then the user is updated.
Returns 404 if user not found. Returns the updated user data.

get.description: List AWS resource discoveries with pagination, sort, field filters, and response field selection.

post.description:
Trigger AWS resource discovery for a cloud account.

Discovers resources across specified regions and types, persists results,
and soft-deletes stale resources.

**Query params:**
- BaseApiResponseQueryParams: api_fields, api_include (e.g. ?api_include=cloud_account,aws_resource).

post.description:
Validate Azure credentials from environment variables.

Uses Azure credentials from environment variables:
- JETSCALE_CLIENT_AZURE_TENANT_ID
- JETSCALE_CLIENT_AZURE_CLIENT_ID
- JETSCALE_CLIENT_AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET (or JETSCALE_CLIENT_AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PATH)
- JETSCALE_CLIENT_AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID

Returns validation status and subscription details if successful.

get.description: Get supported Azure authentication methods.

Retrieve the discovered Azure resources.

Args:
    request: The FastAPI request object containing query parameters.
    current_user_session: The current active user session.

Returns:
    A BaseApiResponse containing the list of discovered resources and metadata.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the user doesn't have required permissions or an internal error occurs.

post.description:
Discover and list Azure resources.

Uses Azure credentials from environment variables to discover resources
in real-time using Azure SDK (equivalent to 'az resource list').

Args:
    request_body: The request body containing resource_types and locations filters.
    response: The FastAPI response object to set headers.
    current_user_session: The current active user session.

Returns:
    A BaseApiResponse containing the results or None if an error occurred.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the user doesn't have required permissions or an internal error occurs.

**Request Body:**
- `resource_types`: Filter by resource types (optional)
- `locations`: Filter by Azure regions (optional)

**Supported Resource Types:**
All Azure resource types are supported (e.g., Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts, Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines).

post.description:
Create a cloud account integration and link a cloud account to it.
Cloud account and integration must share the same cloud_provider_type (AWS or AZURE).
integration_data must match the provider schema (e.g. AWS: CLIENT_AWS_REGION, CLIENT_AWS_ROLE_ARN, etc.).
Returns the created cloud account with cloud_account_integration included.

post.description:
Generate recommendations for resources from ResourceDiscovery (V2).

V2 Changes:
- Accepts resource_arns in request body instead of recommendation_ids
- Uses ResourceDiscovery as source of truth
- Starts workflow from resource data instead of COH recommendations
- Currently supports ElastiCache only

Request Body:
- resource_arns: List of AWS resource ARNs (1-10 resources)

get.description:
Get all system settings with their current values and metadata.
Requires superuser privileges.

Returns settings with:
- Current value (resolved from env > db > default)
- Source (where the value came from)
- Category and description
- Whether it's overridden by environment variable

post.description:
Update system settings.
Requires superuser privileges.

Settings are merged with existing values (partial update).
Changes are logged in the audit trail.

Note: Settings with environment variable overrides will still show
the env value when retrieved, but the DB value will be stored.

put.description:
Update system settings.
Requires superuser privileges.

Settings are merged with existing values (partial update).
Changes are logged in the audit trail.

Note: Settings with environment variable overrides will still show
the env value when retrieved, but the DB value will be stored.

get.description:
Get audit log of system settings changes.
Requires superuser privileges.

Returns a paginated list of all changes made to system settings,
including who made the change, when, and what was changed.

Check if the current user has superuser privileges.
Available to all authenticated users.

Returns the user's superuser status for frontend UI decisions.

post.description:
Reset system settings to defaults.
Requires superuser privileges.

Can reset specific keys or all settings.
Resetting removes the value from the database, causing the system
to fall back to environment variables or code defaults.

get.description:
Get user-specific settings (placeholder for future implementation).
Available to all authenticated users.
